purposeField.label: Choose template
purposeField.noDataLabel: No templates available for this e-service

consumerField.label: Consumer
consumerField.infoLabel: Select your organization or the organization for which you have an active delegation as a consumer

eserviceField.label: Choose e-service
eserviceField.infoLabel: Here you will find only the e-services for which the consumer has an active request

alert.label: The facilitated compilation feature is available for the selected e-service!

eserviceRiskAnalysisSection.title: Choose purpose
eserviceRiskAnalysisSection.description: The selected e-service requires the producer to receive data from consumers. You can select from the purposes proposed by the producer the one for which you intend to send data to its e-service.

purposeTemplateField.title: Facilitated purpose compilation
purposeTemplateField.description: This feature guides you through the risk analysis with annotations, supporting documents, and some pre-populated responses. The simplified template is available for reuse by other producers and can be used without restrictions.

usePurposeTemplateSwitch.label: Use the facilitated compilation feature
usePurposeTemplateSwitch.disabledTooltip:
It is not possible to use the feature for the selected 
 e-service because the producer has not indicated how personal data will be processed

selectPurposeTemplate.title: Choose the facilitated purpose compilation template
selectPurposeTemplate.showOnlyLinkedPurposeTemplates: Show only templates suggested for the selected e-service

acknowledgeInfoResponsibility.label: I acknowledge that, even in the presence of pre-filled suggestions, it is my responsibility to verify and validate all information before publication.
acknowledgeInfoResponsibility.requiredError: You must accept the conditions to proceed

usePurposeTemplateSwitch.evaluatorWarningAlert: If you choose the facilitated compilation, you will not be able to assign the compilation or the approval of the risk analysis to the evaluator.

nameField.label: Purpose name
nameField.infoLabel: It will help you tell them apart. Min 5 characters, max 60 characters

isFreeOfChargeField.label: How will you make the data you receive from this e-service available?

freeOfChargeReasonField.label: Free of charge reason
freeOfChargeReasonField.infoLabel: Explain why you will make this data available free of charge. Indicate whether you are doing so under a statutory exemption or exclusion, or for another reason. Minimum 10 characters, maximum 250 characters.

stepAssignment.title: Assignment
stepAssignment.description: You can fill in the risk analysis on your own, or entrust a reviewer with the approval or the compilation.

label.selfWritesReviewerSigns: Who will approve the risk analysis?
label.reviewerWritesReviewerSigns: Who will fill in the risk analysis?

reviewerField.requiredError: To proceed, please select a reviewer

noReviewersAlert.message: Your institution does not yet have a user with the reviewer role. You can add one from the Reserved Area.

stepAssignment.delegateAlert: As the delegate to consuming the e-service {{name}}, you cannot assign the risk analysis to a reviewer but you can complete it yourself.

loadEstimationSection.title: Estimate API calls
loadEstimationSection.description: Indicates the number of calls expected each day for this purpose.

dailyCalls.label: Estimated number of API calls/day
dailyCalls.infoLabel: Please enter a number greater than or equal to 1.

validation.integer: Threshold value must be an integer

providerThresholdsInfo.label: Thresholds defined by the provider
providerThresholdsInfo.description: Residual calls may vary if the provider receives other purposes before your publication.

alerts.infoDailyCallsPerConsumerExceed: The number you entered exceeds the user limit. The purpose must be approved by the provider.
alerts.infoDailyCallsTotalExceed: The number you entered exceeds the total threshold. The purpose must be approved by the provider.
alerts.infoDailyCallsPerConsumerResidualExceed: The number you entered exceeds the remaining per-consumer threshold. The purpose must be approved by the provider.
alerts.infoDailyCallsTotalResidualExceed: The number you entered exceeds the total remaining threshold. The purpose must be approved by the provider.
alerts.infoDailyCallsMaximumReached: The provider has already received the maximum number of API calls per day. The purpose must be approved by the provider.

stepRiskAnalysis.title: Risk analysis
stepRiskAnalysis.description: The questions below will change based on the answers provided. If you edit an answer above, it may change the following questions
stepRiskAnalysis.personalInfoAlert: Warning: do not put personal data inside text fields

readOnlySubtitle.SUBMITTED: You can't edit the risk analysis because it has been submitted to the reviewer for approval.
readOnlySubtitle.SIGNED: The risk analysis can't be edited because it has been approved by the reviewer.
readOnlySubtitle.ASSIGNED: You can't edit the risk analysis because it has been assigned to the reviewer to fill it out.

stepRiskAnalysis.rejectedAlert: The reviewer rejected the risk analysis. Edit the analysis and submit it again for approval.

versionMismatchDialog.title: Risk analysis update
versionMismatchDialog.description: There is a new version of risk analysis available. The one compiled previously is obsolete and can no longer be used. If you click "Update", all the fields that have not changed and were filled in will already be filled in in the new version

personalDataFlag.label: Personal data processing

content.true: The producer declares to process personal data
content.false: The producer declares not to process personal data
content.undefined: The producer has not declared the processing of personal data

incompatibleAnswerError.purposeEdit: The answer in this field differs from what was defined by the e-service producer

personalDataFlag.alertForIncompatibleAnswer: Please ensure that the answer to the question "Indicate whether you access personal data (required)" matches the one the producer provided in the general information. If the data does not match, publication will be blocked.

alertForIncompatibleAnswerPurpose.personalData: You will not be able to publish this purpose because you declared that personal data is processed, but the producer declared otherwise. For clarification, contact the producer.
alertForIncompatibleAnswerPurpose.noPersonalData: You will not be able to publish this purpose because you declared that personal data is not processed, but the producer declared otherwise. For clarification, contact the producer.

stepRiskAnalysis.requestApprovalAlert: To assign the risk analysis to the reviewer you need to answer all the questions.

requestApprovalDialog.title: Request approval
requestApprovalDialog.description: By confirming, you will assign the approval of the risk analysis to the reviewer {{reviewerName}} and you will no longer be able to make changes.

generalInformationSection.title: Purpose information
generalInformationSection.subtitle: This information was pre-filled by the creator of the facilitated purpose template and cannot be modified.

dailyCallsField.label: How many API calls/day do you estimate to make?

summary.title: Summary

alerts.associationRemoved: The client association was removed within the process. It will be possible to associate one or more clients only after the activation of the purpose.
alerts.newRiskAnalysisAvailable: This draft is no longer publishable. Since its creation, a new version of the risk analysis has been released. Delete it and create a new one.
alerts.descriptorOrAgreementArchived: This draft is no longer publishable. The agreement of this e-service is no longer active. Delete it and create a new one.

rulesetExpired.label: This risk analysis uses an obsolete version that you cannot publish.

alerts.infoRulesetExpiration: This risk analysis uses a version that will become obsolete in {{days}} days. Publish it by {{date}} to avoid having to recompile it.
alerts.infoApprovalMayBeRequired: If the producer receives other purposes before your publication, approval may be required.
alerts.infoDailyCallsPerConsumerExceed: The estimated number of calls you indicated exceeds the per-consumer threshold. The purpose must be approved by the producer.
alerts.infoDailyCallsTotalExceed: The estimated number of calls you indicated exceeds the total threshold. The purpose will need to be approved by the producer.
alerts.infoDailyCallsPerConsumerResidualExceed: The estimated number of calls you indicated exceeds the remaining threshold per consumer. The purpose must be approved by the provider.
alerts.infoDailyCallsTotalResidualExceed: The estimated number of calls you indicated exceeds the total remaining threshold. The purpose will need to be approved by the provider.
alerts.infoDailyCallsMaximumReached: The provider has already received the maximum number of API calls per day. The purpose must be approved by the provider.

dailyCallsPerConsumer.label: Per consumer threshold set by the producer

dailyCallsTotal.label: Total threshold set by the producer

riskAnalysisSection.title: Risk analysis
riskAnalysisSection.providerRiskAnalysisAlert: The e-service selected for this purpose requires data to be sent from the consumer to the producer. The risk analysis was therefore compiled by the producer.

infoAlert.adminWritesReviewerSigns: Once the reviewer has approved the risk analysis, you will be able to publish the purpose.
infoAlert.reviewerWritesReviewerSigns: Once the reviewer has compiled and approved the risk analysis, you will be able to publish the purpose.

rejectedAlert.label: The reviewer rejected the risk analysis. Read the reason, edit the analysis and submit it again for approval.

summary.publishBtnDisabled: Your declaration on personal data processing in the risk analysis prevents publication
summary.publishBtnDisabledByReview: You will be able to publish once the reviewer has approved the risk analysis.

riskAnalysisRejectionDrawer.title: Risk analysis rejection
riskAnalysisRejectionDrawer.intro: The reviewer rejected the risk analysis with the following reason.

list.cantCreatePurposeTooltip: You cannot create purposes because you have no associable e-service
list.newVersionAvailableTooltip: The consumer has requested an adjustment that requires your approval. Access the purpose for more details
list.waitingForApprovalVersionTooltip: You have requested an adjustment that requires approval from the producer. Access the purpose for more details

providerView.suspendedAlert: This purpose is suspended. Until it is reactivated, the consumer will not be able to access the data provided through the API.
providerView.waitingForApprovalAlert: The consumer has requested a load estimate update which requires your approval. Check the “Load Estimate” section.
providerView.archivedPurposeAlert: The consumer will not be able to obtain a voucher from PDND Interoperabilità for this purpose because it is archived.
providerView.rejectedPurposeAlert: This purpose has been rejected. <1>Read here the reject reason</1>.
providerView.rejectedUpdatePlanInfoAlert: A change of plan for this purpose was rejected. Check the “Load Estimate” section.

technicalInformations.title: Purpose technical information
technicalInformations.description: In this section you can check the technical information of the purpose.

loadEstimate.title: API call estimation
loadEstimate.description: The number of calls expected each day to the e-service
loadEstimate.rejectedUpdatePlanAlert: The plan change was rejected. <1>Read the reject reasons here</1>.

waitingForApprovalPlan.changePlan: Change of estimate requested by the consumer
waitingForApprovalPlan.newPurpose: The plan requested by the consumer

title.rejectedPlan: The plan requested by the Consumer

mode.label: Mode
mode.adminWritesReviewerSigns: Completed autonomously, approved by the reviewer
mode.reviewerWritesReviewerSigns: Completed and approved by the reviewer

consumerView.suspendedAlert: This purpose is suspended. Until it is reactivated you will not be able to access the data made available through the API.
consumerView.waitingForApprovalAlert: This scope is waiting for approval. Until its activation by the producer you will not be able to access the data made available through the API and you will not be able to associate clients.
consumerView.archivedPurposeAlert: This purpose is archived. You cannot access the data made available through the API. You can always <1>create a new one.</1>
consumerView.archivedPurposeClientsAlert: This purpose has been archived. All clients were removed and new clients can no longer be associated
consumerView.rejectedPurposeAlert: This purpose has been rejected. <2>Read here the reject reason</2>.
consumerView.rejectedUpdatePlanInfoAlert: A change of plan for this purpose was rejected. Check the “Load Estimate” section in <1>Purpose Details</1>.
consumerView.noClientsAlert: This purpose is active but has no associated clients. <1>Pair your first client</1> to access e-service data.
consumerView.noClientsAlertForDelegateWithoutClientPe: This intent is active but has no associated clients. Wait for {{delegatorName}} to connect its clients for the request to complete.
consumerView.cloneDisabledDueToExpiredRuleset: It is not possible to clone the purpose because the risk analysis model has been updated and is no longer compatible

addClientToPurposeDisableTooltip.label: Only an administrator can manage members of a client

tabs.ariaLabel: Two different tabs for purposes details and associated clients

loadEstimate.title: API call estimation
loadEstimate.description: The number of calls expected each day to the e-service
loadEstimate.rejectedUpdatePlanAlert: The plan change was rejected. <1>Read the reject reasons here</1>.

updatePlanCard.title: New estimate required
updatePlanCard.subtitle: (API calls/day)
updatePlanCard.expectApprovalDateInfo: You estimated to activate this update on the day {{date}}

drawer.title: Request a change of estimate
drawer.subtitle: Indicates a new number of calls expected each day for this purpose. For full information, <1>see the guide</1>.
drawer.currentDailyCalls: The current estimate is {{dailyCalls}} API calls/day.

dailyCallsFormField.label: New estimate of API calls/day
dailyCallsFormField.infoLabel: Enter a number greater than or equal to 1

validation.sameValue: The number of API calls/day requested must be different than the current one

providerThresholdsInfo.label: Thresholds defined by the provider
providerThresholdsInfo.description: Residual calls may vary if the provider receives other purposes before your publication.

riskAnalysisSection.title: Risk analysis
riskAnalysisSection.description: You can update the estimate only if the risk analysis for this purpose remains unchanged

checkbox.label: The risk analysis is unchanged
checkbox.requiredValidation: To request the update, confirm that the risk analysis has remained unchanged

alerts.infoDailyCallsPerConsumerExceed: The new call estimate you requested exceeds the per-consumer threshold and will need to be approved by the provider.
alerts.infoDailyCallsTotalExceed: The new call estimate you requested exceeds the total threshold and will need to be approved by the provider.
alerts.infoDailyCallsPerConsumerResidualExceed: The new call estimate you requested exceeds the remaining threshold per consumer and will need to be approved by the provider.
alerts.infoDailyCallsTotalResidualExceed: The new call estimate you requested exceeds your total remaining threshold and will need to be approved by your provider.
alerts.infoDailyCallsMaximumReached: The provider has already received the maximum number of API calls per day. The new call estimate will need to be approved by the provider.

alertExceedingThreshold.label: If the number of calls exceeds the limit set by the producer, its approval will be required to use that load

riskAnalysisSummary.publishBtnDisabled: Your declaration on personal data processing in the risk analysis prevents publication
riskAnalysisSummary.infoAlert: Once you approve the risk analysis, the administrator will be able to publish the purpose.

isFreeOfCharge.label: How will you make the data you receive from this e-service available?

noData.label: You have no risk analysis to evaluate

noResults.label: The current search returned no results.

active.title: You have published a purpose
active.description: The purpose is active. Associate your first client to access the e-service data.

waitingForApproval.title: Your purpose has been forwarded to the provider for approval
waitingForApproval.description: Until its activation by the provider, you will not be able to access data made available through the API and you will not be able to associate clients. You will receive a notification when the provider approves your purpose

approveThankYou.title: You have approved the risk analysis
approveThankYou.description: The administrator will be able to publish the purpose. You will no longer see this risk analysis among those you need to complete or approve.

rejectThankYou.title: You have rejected the risk analysis
rejectThankYou.description: The administrator will receive the reason for your rejection. You will no longer see this risk assessment among those you need to complete or approve.
